samples.comment: Hailey who I finally spoke to was great and quickly solved my problem, however, it took a long time to get to a real person.  You AI bot wasted a lot of time and was frustrating to deal with.

After purchasing many of your products since the first Spark practice amp, I was disappointed to have to go through so many different procedures, on a very basic product.

I will certainly take this into consideration in the future.  You would benefit from looking to follow more successful companies warranty and replacement policies.

This is the second time I have attempted to get support for your product, and the second time that i was basically told that there is no solution to the issue.  This time, it seems to be an unfortunate limitation of the product design.  The previous issue, (which still bothers me that it is still unresolved), is a direct conflict with the advertising of what the product is capable of.  Instead of making good on what you said the product can do, you tell me to change the music streaming service I use.  Still not happy with the, 'yeah....it won't do what we said it would do, but instead of fixing it, you just need to adjust how you get your music...we can't be bothered to actually deliver what we promised from our end' approach.  Not a fan.

Since the available reasons don't match my experience, I'd say:  The "brand" quality or performance did not meet my expectations.  Meaning, I expected more from this company to maintain and recognize customer loyalty.  I asked if $80, the difference between pre- and post-holiday sale on Spark Live could be credited to my account towards the purchase of yet another Spark product, Spark Link XLR.  I would have been happy with a percentage of the $80 difference, say $40--but of course, your AI persona doesn't negotiate.  Needless to say, the AI represents your brand, so your brand basically says "hey, well like other companies, you are SOL.  Next time take that into consideration if you plan to purchase directly from PositiveGrid.  This ain't Costco, fool."  All said with a virtual smile and a heart shaped by virtual index fingers and thumbs.
AI response failed to comprehend my concern. AI response offered false information on price.
I do not like the fact that an AI answered my question
The response I received from "AI" was total nonsense and factually incorrect. It even told me I was "confused". At the second attempt "AI" admitted I was right.
My item didn’t ship until several days after it said it did, all I got was an AI response saying it was on its way.

You have a fabulous product with horrible support. You hide behind AI generated responses. Then many days later after your ai send the same bs response that does not work, over and over. You get a possible real person, who sends the same thing. Your updating is not in todays standards.

I'm a user of Bias FX 2, upgraded to X but found out you can't easily migrate presets.

Supports answer was basically manually create them again or get AI to generate, total nonsense.  These are related products and it should be a no brainier to move presets from Bias FX 2 to X given X is marketed as an upgrade to Bias FX 2. 

I can deal with this, but it really reflects poor thinking on product migration.
AI response on product feedback so no idea if it will ever get to a person for review.
None of these worked. Still trying to do this without buying or adding additional hardware. Would really be nice if it was all self contained in the spark app.

AI was used to respond to my inquiry and it took too long.  AI then passed to the team which took another couple additional days.  Bottom line is that Positive Grid  (PG) should carry all accessories supporting items sold under PG brand name. I was looking for the audio cable and charger adapter to use with the CAB and those were not shown under Accessories so I had to write and that was a letdown experience.  I lost interest by the time I got the answer.

I was given a price by the ai of $250 and then the regular sales price by staff with a $20 dollar coupon that voided my $10 coupon...  the lack of consistency   made me look elsewhere for what I needed. I wanted to upgrade and continue giving business but this type of customer service worries me in commitment towards additional products from positive grid.

You guys are on the verge of great 
Keep pushing - fender tonemaster and yamaha still deliver better tone but your vocal tone is excellent. AI for tone shaping is the best - putting pedals on amps very good but not quite show ready - love your products
i have already sent emails about your customer service ,absolutely no help at all .Read my previous emails

1. Why AI answer for customer?
2. Why the customer have to solve your product problem?
3. Why dont learn about the comment from customer?
4. You cant make any bussines with theese all.
Sorry Guys!!!
Ai information & not correct.

I submitted a help request when the serial number for my Spark 2 wasn't accepted for registration.
I was then surprised that your AI came back with an answer right away. Its solution was everything that I had tried already. I also consulted with my Sweetwater agent who was as confused as I was. 
That's why I asked for a human. AI help was no help.

If you're having a return and replace why would you not send over the replacement so we can use the box to return the original one. 3 weeks and still trying to get a resolution. I send it last Friday the 16th and no update on the new one being mailed. Im a disabled vet that place music to help feed my family and this has by far been the worse customer service I have received. WHY?

allComments.comment: Information could have been better researched and the website should have been up to date

When I placed my order I immediately realized I was having it sent to my old address. I reached out to customer support right away and they took three days to respond. Due to the delay in response, it was too late to change the address. The website has no options to edit orders or cancel. Now someone else is going to receive my 240$ amp.
Hailey who I finally spoke to was great and quickly solved my problem, however, it took a long time to get to a real person.  You AI bot wasted a lot of time and was frustrating to deal with.

All the above and product does not work period I'm shocked the app even works all tho the app only works when it wants to
The response I received from "AI" was total nonsense and factually incorrect. It even told me I was "confused". At the second attempt "AI" admitted I was right.

I had to purchase an adapter so that I could connect my Spark 2 to the newly purchased Spark Cab. No mention was made that you needed the adapter. Your instructions show the provided cord connecting. On top of that it cost over $10.00 for a less than $1.00 part that should have been included with the purchase of the Spark Cab.
Incorrect information given, I have since learnt how to do it on YouTube

The eventual outcome was excellent but it took a few days and I had  to chase which wasn’t a great experience. Still love you though

The entire support process was very slow. Just deflected the issue since it was with Amazon - but I understood that. So what was supposed to be a 3 day delivery turned into a 18 day delivery. Ridiculous. I'm still excited for the product/AMP I ordered because I heard great things, but the support was not good. Also, you guys need more options for shipping. I can help you guys with that. I can save you guys a boatload of money on the shipping side and you can get your product to your customers much faster and give them way more options if they're looking for a faster delivery time. Seriously, take a look please we want to help and should have a conversation. https://gg.consulting/shipping We look forward to hearing from you guys. Best, Mike Esposito GG.Consulting

Sorry Guys!!!

It took a whole business day to get the crappiest aí response from support I've ever seen. About five days later a person came in to apologize. I lost interest in doing business with this company. It looks like I'll see the replacement device I got from the store who sold me the item in about a week...

The power adaptor of my SPARK 40 broke and I would need a new one. So, I thought, I could as well order a new SPARK (a SPARK 2), but you don't ship to me anymore.

Neither can I order a replacement for the power supply, not can I order a SPARK 2 as a complete replacement (and improvement).

That's not good.

Disapointed about drivers and software with positive Grid Spark GO , Spark 2 with my MacBook and IPhone 17 Pro.
I canceled my order with Spark live to Classic Amp and Baffle

That's why I asked for a human. AI help was no help.

I send it last Friday the 16th and no update on the new one being mailed. Feedback is very slow. Forgot to attach a shipping label. To get the shipping label took another 2-3 days.
Your AI support is exactly like a lazy intern. Useless.
too costly to return physical unit...didn't think this would be required
I would prefer no chatbot replying. It didn't give me the answers I needed, and only when a human replied I got them

L Noel
Not sure AI is right on my question
To bad the switch changes sounds on lift and not on push won’t buy it till it does (if it can)
I am told in a email inquiry that the price of the Link XLR is $135 but I still see it listed for $169
You make it impossible to make a claim NEVER BUY FROM SPARK  AGAIN
I bought the Spark 2 thinking its user friendly with the CAB 140 and is not. You have no DC supply connect between the CAB and Spark.-disappointing!!!!!

You asked me for some feedback and how I would rate your support. I am honestly not sure how to answer that question- it is either unsatisfied or very unsatisfied.

Most of your communication to me has been AI. While it hasn’t been offensive, it is certainly not a personal touch.

I had to wait over a week to get the original delivery because of how you chose to ship the product.

Once you determined to replace the amp, I requested a faster mode of shipping since I had already waited so long.

Instead, you still chose to ship it ground. I understand that the delay is now due to this storm which you have no control over, but if you had chosen any other method of shipping than ground, I would have the amp.

So bottom line, you have had my money since LAST MONTH and I still don’t  have a working amp.

You tell me, is that quality customer support? In my mind it is far from it.

This amp better measure up to your hype.

I bought a spark 2 from reverb.com. tried to register. Your website told me the previous owner had to deregister. I contacted owner and he did his part. I tried to re register and it's still saying it's registered. Your AI chat also said it's still registered. Previous owner said that his account with you guys says there are no items registered to him. Id like to find a solution to this.

I recieved assurances that the product would be delivered at a date that came and went. Nothing was done until I really started pestering your company and had to do my own research to figure out why the VAI
guitar amp was not delivered on the date assured and was finally delivered but considerably well after the date declared.

Bonjour
Impossible de me connecter…l’apairage en Bluetooth se fait pourtant 
Et puis une version en français serait bien.
Devin ne parles t-il-pas français ?
L Noel

I asked about an item that you have on sale (and are still advertising as such), but that you are sold out of: the 20% off spark2 pearl. Amazon and your US website still has stock. Your AI response was basically that they were sorry for my bad luck, but there is no way to get the sale price honoured when the stock comes in. It feels dismissive and I don’t quite understand why you are willing to loose a sale because of your inability to be sufficiently stocked. As I have been weighing my very competitive options for new gear, a 20% sale tipped the scale in your favour…and then it didn’t. I don’t expect anything more than an AI generated response to this, but I am curious WHY you are not able to honour your sale price for a customer who expresses a desire to purchase within the sale window? 
     I’m very disappointed and considering other options (e.g. Yamaha THR)
Figured it would have been an easy solve.
